title: Eva unit size discussion not at all serious
display_title: Eva unit size discussion not at all serious
wikitext:
[]: Eva unit size discussion... not at all serious.             Quote Post by NetVoyagerOne » Sun May 18, 2008 1:27 pm I know it has been done to death, but I can't stop thinking about it. The other day, I picked up one of those plastic green army men. While it rested in the palm of my hand, I noticed the similarity in scale between the soldier and when Unit-01 nearly crushes Toji and Kensuke in episode 3. If you take the height of the army guy and turn his height of 2 inches to 2 meters, and to the same with my height, you get this. I like this a lot better than the 40m minimum... at that height, an entry plug could not fit into the Eva's back! Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun May 18, 2008 1:32 pm Their size fluctuates, you know. Typically from 40 to 70 meters IIRC Hell, in EoE's Lilith scenes Eva-01 should be many kilometers long

[]:             Quote Post by NetVoyagerOne » Sun May 18, 2008 1:35 pm I know the size fluctuates, I'm just trying to establish a 'base' height, if you were to see one in real life.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sun May 18, 2008 1:40 pm Speaking of height, then how much would an EVA weigh? If it's 70 meters tall, and solid flesh and ceramic, how much does all that stuff weigh? Anyway, mI've been going with a basic height of an ambiguous thirty stories... It makes things less defined, but at the same time, people can visualise thirty stories better than they can visualise 100 meters

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 18, 2008 5:25 pm Dartz wrote: Speaking of height, then how much would an EVA weigh?

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun May 18, 2008 5:25 pm Does unit 01's horn fluctuate in size with its mood?

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Sun May 18, 2008 10:44 pm Iron Rooster wrote: Does unit 01's horn fluctuate in size with its mood?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 1:08 am Well, they say that one, ordinary sub-machine gun bullet used by the Evas is about the size of Misato. Now compare that to Misato, the SMG and the Eva itself.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon May 19, 2008 2:24 am When did the Evas ever use SMGs?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 2:28 am Pallet rifle, machine gun...those guns Eva-01 was holding in the battle against Shamshel. Well, doesn't matter I was just assuming. I was just suggesting its comparable size of the bullets, is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 19, 2008 8:13 am Look at Ep 3 when Misato is with Ritsuko on the cleanup of the Sachiel incident, they're loading N2 mines into the building. Compare Misato or Ritsuko to on of those, than compare that to Unit-00 when it was running around with one in it's hand.

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 20, 2008 3:17 pm wow Evas are tiny compared to some other Angels though. http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/angel-size-comparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue May 20, 2008 5:05 pm terminus wrote: wow Evas are tiny compared to some other Angels though. http://www.evacommentary.org/appendix/angel-size-comparison.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 20, 2008 6:49 pm Iron Rooster wrote: And oddly enough, I find it odd that Matariel is one of the largest angels yet it is so weak that even the pallet rifle can pwn its ass.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue May 20, 2008 7:58 pm Wow...Gaghiel's THAT big? That's enormous! But I would've thought Sahaquiel would've been slightly more bigger, but since it's from the FGC, I won't argue.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 20, 2008 8:14 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Wow...Gaghiel's THAT big? That's enormous!

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Tue May 20, 2008 10:06 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Wow...Gaghiel's THAT big? That's enormous! But I would've thought Sahaquiel would've been slightly more bigger, but since it's from the FGC, I won't argue.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed May 21, 2008 1:15 am Sachi_13 wrote: Look at Ep 3 when Misato is with Ritsuko on the cleanup of the Sachiel incident, they're loading N2 mines into the building. Compare Misato or Ritsuko to on of those, than compare that to Unit-00 when it was running around with one in it's hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed May 21, 2008 7:54 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Iron Rooster wrote: And oddly enough, I find it odd that Matariel is one of the largest angels yet it is so weak that even the pallet rifle can pwn its ass.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 21, 2008 8:02 pm No. Most pathetic Angel is Bardiel. I'd go into detail for my opinion, but that's not what this thread is about!
